name: church-data-management-system
description: Comprehensive Church Data Management System - React Frontend with Node.js Backend

scripts.build:client: cd client && ESLINT_NO_DEV_ERRORS=true npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.test: cd server && npm test && cd ../client && CI=true npm test -- --watchAll=false

author: Church Development Team
